programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Perry Mason The case of the reckless romeo
programme.desc: Sleazy talk show host Ted Mayne has a tell-all book that enrages prominent women One actress Roxanne Shield makes a televised death threat Ted is murdered and she is charged Witnesses say they saw her outside his apartment that night

programme.title: Conquest of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Following a North American pandemic from a space-borne disease that wiped out all dogs and cats in 1983 the government has become a series of Schutzstaffel-patterned police states that took chimpanzees gorillas and orangutans as pets before establishing a culture based on ape slave labor These events were foretold in 1973 as testimony by two chimpanzee scientists who came from the distant future Cornelius and Zira before they were killed Widely believed to be dead their baby was secretly raised by the circus owner Armando as a young horseback rider In 1991 now fully grown and named Caesar the ape is brought to one of the cities to distribute flyers for Armandos circus During their trip Armando advises Caesar not to speak in public for fear of his life

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: TBH 131
programme.desc: TBH 131

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Return of the Tiger
programme.desc: Return of the Tiger

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who dont know their land holds lots of gold Gene puts a stop to it

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Bullwinkle 529
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 529

programme.title: Knight 312
programme.desc: Knight 312

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack track down a cursed scalpel that has found its way into the hands of a talented surgeon

programme.title: The Midnight Hour
programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A sadistic serial killer has unforeseen complications when pursued by a determined motorcycle cop in a barren desert

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An abnormally difficult child tests a psychologist

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Predatory electronics salesman Jack Rhodes uses a video dating service to pick up lonely young women for one-night stands but meets his match in cunning enticing Barbara who invites Jack on a date to her high-rise apartment loft

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While passing through a small town Eric is shot and buried by a deranged cop-wannabe who is murdering vagrants while impersonating a police officer Alamo Joe catches up to Eric and Eric convinces him that the phony cop is a serial killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric comes into a town looking for Skorzany after hearing about several murders by a skinwalker He learns from a Native American medicine man that there may be a cure In the end Eric finds out that the cure was a lie and he moves on

programme.title: Knight 305
programme.desc: Knight 305

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Kay inherits country property in New York so Roger enters into an agreement to sell their California home and move The purchaser who works for the IRS threatens to sue the Posts if their behavior is not to is liking

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When the gangs hidden cache of money - needed to purchase a secret map - goes up in smoke the men of Stalag 13 must come up with a way to replace the cash - and decide to pull off a bank heist in the nearby town

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Nearby war games inspire Hogan to replace some of the blank German ammunition with live ammo using Klinks birthday as a diversion

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Tinker is arrested for the theft of Binghamtons printing press and The Captain taps Parker to be Tinkers Defense Counsel in a trial which Binghamton himself will preside over Parker and McHale must then stall the proceedings while Gruber and The Crew execute a plan to get Tinker off the hook with a bit of creative evidence-tampering

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy directive - Ordering all married Officers to be shipped home - Prompts Binghamton to scheme to get McHale married off to a shady saloon-keeper by the name of Kate OHara - An old friend of McHales But neither Kate nor McHale want to tie the knot so they join forces to try to thwart Binghamtons plan

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Part 3 of Sea Maneuvers has Carter challenging the Petty Chief Officer to a boxing match not knowing the Chief was the Fleet Champ with 37 knockouts

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While sitting in a restaurant Gomer witnesses an automobile accident between Sergeant Carter and another driver When in court Gomer takes the oath seriously to tell the truth the whole truth and nothing but the truth

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The hungry castaways find a wild duck on the island but they dont know whether to use it as food or attach a message to him and hope for rescue

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligans Christmas wish appears to be coming true when a radio broadcast tells them their rescue is imminent While they wait they recall the first days on the island when Gilligan lost the radio and transmitter

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Kate are upset when Luke sells food on credit to a failing restaurant run by a widow and her daughter but the McCoy patriarch softens his no credit stance considerably when he learns that the proprietress is attractive and spunky

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E21
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E21

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: After Max hides some secret plans he has to go into a jail to retrieve them

programme.title: Smart 522
programme.desc: Smart 522

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: The Retriever
programme.desc: A martial artist Max Thayer flees with an ex-agents manuscript and sister Shawn Hoskins while on a mission for the CIA

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw has invented a spray that rots wood instantly If he is not paid one million dollars he will destroy every forest in the world Inspector gadget destroys the invention

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: MAD agents have hidden a bomb in the amusement park in Metro City

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: What happens when the swamp itself is no longer an ally to Swamp Thing The answers lay with a man called Mephisto

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While exploring a cavern in an asteroid the Alphans release Balor a sadistic alien who has achieved immortality

programme.title: What Waits Below
programme.desc: An army experiment in submarine communications falls foul of the deadly secret hidden deep within the cave system housing their transmitter

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: While stopped at the Boars Nest Loretta Lynn is kidnapped by a trio who want her to offer tips about breaking into the music business

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam and Renee investigate a dead pregnant woman missing her fetus They discover a town that Daan helped after a nuclear meltdown and a suspicious brother and sister who were part of an early experiment to combine human and Taelon DNA

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The team is sent to Grovers Mill when it is discovered the 1938 radio broadcast of invasion was real They meet with a group of local men who successfully fought the Martians 50 years ago and believe the Martians have returned to try and retrieve weapons abandoned in 1938

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.desc: The Fugitive

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: The sociopathic son of a neighbor recently returned from away stirs up serious trouble for the Barclays

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When Cheyenne is hired as foreman at a ranch in a range war he doesnt realize part of his job is to marry the boss daughter She turns down all the men her father introduces her to as she loves a Mexican but he hates Mexicans

programme.desc: James Woods plays the perfect homely US Navy sailor in dress blues with a bad temper along with his Navy buddies they are looking for a jeweler that closed his store a few days before they hit town Their course leads to murder anchors aweigh

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Briggs poses as an American tourist and subjects himself to a show trial in order to discredit a public prosecutor attempting to seize absolute power in his country

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: The Bronx Warriors
programme.desc: In a post-apocalyptic New York City a policeman infiltrates the Bronx which has become a battleground for several murderous street gangs

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Thunderbolt and Lightfoot
programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: Bulletproof
programme.desc: A group of terrorists seize the Thunderblast top-secret super tank hiding it in Mexico The task of recovering it is entrusted to Frank McBain a former secret agent and current cop

programme.title: Fire Birds
programme.desc: Elite Apache helicopter pilots are tasked with destroying powerful armed drug cartels operating in South America

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: The son of Torren learns of his heritage goes to avenge the deaths of his fellow villagers and rescue his sister from the evil Dakkar and his spider cult

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 47 kicks off with with a Featherweight Title Fight in the Amateur Division as striker Joe ""Flash"" Mapanda challenges the reigning champion Justin Basra. This is followed by an Amateur Lightweight Title Fight as Tom ""The Greek Warrior"" Theocharis takes on Alex Martinez. Wrapping up this episode is a pro bout between wrestler TJ Laramie and Luke Noel. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Some of the best finishes from 'Shock N Awe'.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Benny Carr v. Kieran Rice

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: State of State
programme.desc: Welcome to the official homepage of “STATE of STATE with Justin King and Tom Hannifan" presented by the Bleav Network. WE ARE your destination for year round Penn State football coverage!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.desc: Sherard sits down with Cobra Kai star Sean Kanan aka Mr Mike Barnes Learn how the success of Karate Kid 3 and Cobra Kai still amazes him

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The city of Turad is ruled by a demon queen According to an old prophecy she will be defeated only by a child of a stargazer The team is trying to fulfill the prophecy but for them to succeed Diana will have to make a hard choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Eric carelessly opens a magic box thereby summoning the Ultimate Evil which threatens to destroy everything Even Dungeon Master is no match for it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Inspector Gadget

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Dr Claw steals the big red ruby of India to use in his superlaser to destroy US communications satellites

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: A captured Cy-Kill is held temporarily on a remote prison planet Elba while a new Brainstorming device is readied; Fitor plots to rescue his cohort by defecting to the Guardians

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill s second-in-command is captured by the Guardians

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Audrics image is being projected from a body of water on a planet Jayce goes down to investigate even though Monster Minds are busy draining the water off Jayce meets the fish people the XHal and the Old One and they communicate by telepathy

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: On the ice planet Auriga revolutionary leader Cyrilla makes a deal with Saw Boss -- she delivers Jayce in return for Saw Boss deposing the gangster casino owner Marduk whos made slaves of everyone on the planet Cyrilla realizes her error

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM are on the hunt to find the missing part of the Emerald Arrowhead which will lead to an alien spacecraft the Star Chariot

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: MASK are on a mission to recover hugely radioactive plutonium that VENOM have stolen from an army vehicle

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A New Demon

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Teknoman

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: A warp zone that only opens every 1000 video years is the gateway for King Charles who wants to go home But his final decision is send Gameboy at his place The supercomputer Gameboy turns out to be a lot of trouble for the N team But things get worse when Mother Brain gets Gameboy and and Dr Wily turns him into Game Brain
